---
id: build-ai-summary
title: "Get AI-generated summary of a failed build"
description: "Get AI-generated summary of a failed build. Only available after a build has failed and if the AI build summary feature is enabled in the Project Settings."
sidebar_label: "Get AI-generated summary of a failed build"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get AI-generated summary of a failed build"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/builds/{build-slug}/ai-summary"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get AI-generated summary of a failed build. Only available after a build has failed and if the AI build summary feature is enabled in the Project Settings.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
